pages.text: A scorched basalt platform with a broken Nether portal frame and a loot chest. The reward worth the throw: $(item)crying obsidian$() — the seed of a respawn anchor, and otherwise unobtainable up here.

$(bold)Nether-adjacent spoils$()$(br)The chest holds the vanilla ruined-portal haul: golden gear, flint and steel, fire charges, obsidian and crying obsidian. Crafted from $(item)two obsidian$() and two $(item)gold ingots$().
